name: VA2XP
description: 4-channel stereo enhancer-mixer and output module. Channel 1 combines stereo crossfade and panning, channels 2 and 3 pan with CV, channel 4 handles stereo input, and cue/headphone monitoring stays independent.

controls.name: Channel 1 Level / Crossfade
controls.description: Sets the manual amount of crossfade and overall level on channel 1.

controls.name: Channel 1 Pan
controls.description: Places channel 1 left or right while the crossfade stage moves underneath it.

controls.name: Channel 4 Level
controls.description: Manual level for the stereo input channel.

controls.name: Cue / Mix Button
controls.description: Selects whether the cue input is monitored in the headphone path or mixed into the main output path.

inputs.name: Channel 1 In L
inputs.description: Left or mono input for channel 1.

inputs.name: Channel 1 In R
inputs.description: Right input for channel 1 when used as stereo.

inputs.name: Channel 2 In L
inputs.description: Left or mono input for channel 2.

inputs.name: Channel 2 In R
inputs.description: Right input for channel 2 when used as stereo.

inputs.name: Channel 3 In L
inputs.description: Left or mono input for channel 3.

inputs.name: Channel 3 In R
inputs.description: Right input for channel 3 when used as stereo.

inputs.name: Channel 4 In L
inputs.description: Left input for the stereo channel 4 section.

inputs.name: Channel 4 In R
inputs.description: Right input for the stereo channel 4 section.

behaviors.name: Stereo crossfade on channel 1
behaviors.trigger: channel 1 used as a mono source
behaviors.description: Channel 1 can act like a levelled mono-to-stereo enhancer, with crossfade and panning moving together under manual control and CV.

behaviors.name: Independent panning on channels 2 and 3
behaviors.description: Channels 2 and 3 move the left and right sides with CV and manual pan control, which gives each stereo source its own motion field.

behaviors.name: Stereo channel 4
behaviors.description: Channel 4 is the straightforward stereo input stage. It keeps the last channel available for a fixed stereo source that only needs level control.

behaviors.name: Cue monitoring
behaviors.description: The cue path can be monitored through headphones without changing the main mix. That makes it useful as a performance preview bus.

behaviors.name: Mono-to-stereo lift
behaviors.trigger: mono source into a channel pair
behaviors.description: A single mono source can be spread across the stereo field and still respond to pan CV, which makes the module act like a compact width expander.

behaviors.name: Visual mix feedback
behaviors.description: Front-panel LEDs show every channel, so gain staging and pan movement are visible even when the final output is feeding headphones or a downstream mixer.

patchIdeas.name: Mono-to-stereo spread
patchIdeas.patch: One mono voice into channel 1 · slow LFO into channel 1 CV · pan knob centered then pushed slowly outward · the voice grows width instead of just getting louder.
patchIdeas.diagram:
VA2XP:

VCO:
LFO:
Output:

- VCO (Out) -> VA2XP (Channel 1 In L)
- LFO (Out) >> VA2XP (Channel 1 CV)
- VA2XP (Main Out L) -> Output (L)
- VA2XP (Main Out R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Four-voice panorama
patchIdeas.patch: Four stereo-ish sources across channels 1-4 · channel 1 takes crossfade duties · channels 2 and 3 pan the movement · channel 4 anchors the end of the stereo field.
patchIdeas.diagram:
VA2XP:

Voice 1:
Voice 2:
Voice 3:
Voice 4:
Output:

- Voice 1 (Out) -> VA2XP (Channel 1 In L)
- Voice 2 (Out) -> VA2XP (Channel 2 In L)
- Voice 3 (Out) -> VA2XP (Channel 3 In L)
- Voice 4 (Out) -> VA2XP (Channel 4 In L)
- VA2XP (Main Out L) -> Output (L)
- VA2XP (Main Out R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Cue preview bus
patchIdeas.patch: Drums and synths into the main mix · a separate source into Cue In · headphones monitor the cue path while the main outs keep the audience mix untouched.
patchIdeas.diagram:
VA2XP:

Drums:
Synth:
Click:
Output:

- Drums (Out) -> VA2XP (Channel 2 In L)
- Synth (Out) -> VA2XP (Channel 3 In L)
- Click (Out) -> VA2XP (Cue In)
- VA2XP (Main Out L) -> Output (L)
- VA2XP (Main Out R) -> Output (R)
- VA2XP (Headphones) -> Output (Phones)

patchIdeas.name: Animated stereo stem
patchIdeas.patch: A slow modulation source into the three pan CV inputs · each stereo pair moves on a different trajectory · the module behaves like a compact stereo choreographer for a mixed rig.
patchIdeas.diagram:
VA2XP:

LFO:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> VA2XP (Channel 1 CV)
- LFO (Out) >> VA2XP (Channel 2 CV)
- LFO (Out) >> VA2XP (Channel 3 CV)
- VA2XP (Main Out L) -> Output (L)
- VA2XP (Main Out R) -> Output (R)
